sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 50:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 50:1
items.html: There is no inferiority in it by the nature of its creation, nor would inferiority be revealed in it, had it not been restricted. (Inner Observation, Item 19)
